_comment: Register person-GUIDs that must NOT share a slug with a same-named peer. The officials slug is slugify(name, institution), which is unique only while `institution` names a specific body. For much of the register it does not — 2,538 declarants sit under the group label 'Училища', 1,712 under 'Детски градини', 978 under 'Процедури по ЗОП' — so two different people with the same legal name in the same group collapse onto one slug, and their filings merge into one profile that publishes neither person's wealth correctly. Every GUID listed here is re-slugged with the GUID folded into the disambiguator, which separates it from the peer that keeps the bare slug. Keyed on the GUID rather than the slug because the GUID is the register's own per-person identity and is stable across a declarant's filings. Same discipline as scripts/officials/_aliases.json: an explicit, reviewable table rather than a heuristic. scripts/officials/index.ts warns when it meets a collision that is NOT listed here, so a new one surfaces on the next ingest instead of silently merging.
_whatBelongsHere: ONLY a GUID proven to be a SECOND PERSON. This list is destructive in the other direction: a GUID listed by mistake splits ONE person's history into two profiles, each publishing part of their wealth. That is not hypothetical — 67 of the 72 entries this file once held were mistakes, and they left the ombudsman Диана Ковачева with four profiles (one per 2020 filing) and Петко Салчев with six. Two causes, both now handled: (a) 66 were not person ids at all but per-DOCUMENT guids from the bare-guid filenames the register emitted in 2019-2023 — scripts/officials/slug_identity.ts no longer reads those as an identity; (b) one (943A7E38…, Весела Караиванова-Начева, подуправител на НОИ) was a genuine person id, but the only one on that name — the peer it was 'separated' from was a document id. The remaining 5 are real: same legal name, same group label, disjoint declared property.
_howToAdd: Run the ingest. A 'slug collision' warning names the slug and prints one declaration URL per competing GUID. OPEN BOTH and compare the declared property/income. Identical holdings mean ONE person whose id the register re-issued between folders (it does: Николай Стефанов Петров filed under FBEA081E… in 2014 and 68B238E8… in 2016 with the same house, flat and loan) — change nothing, the merge is already correct. Only when the holdings are genuinely different is it two people: add the SECOND and subsequent GUIDs (leave one out — that person keeps the bare slug) and re-run. Do not add a GUID on the strength of the warning alone.
